LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MICHAEL PINKSTON'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION AND TO REVERSE THE PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO HAVE MATTERS DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. BECAUSE DEFENDANT REPRESENTS THAT HE DID IN FACT SERVE RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION, THOSE REQUESTS WILL NOT BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE AN OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION. THIS MOTION IS BEING HEARD BY JUDGE MILLER BECAUSE JUDGE PRO TEM RENNE WHO SIGNED THE ORIGINAL ORDER FILED MAY 10, 2013 IS NOT SITTING AS A JUDGE PRO TEM UNTIL SEPTEMBER 5, 2013. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Response To Request For Admission And To Reverse The Pltfs Motion To Have Matters Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939, SPECIALL APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL PINKSTON's Motion For Reconsideration Of The Response To Request For Admission And To Reverse The Plaintiffs Motion To Have Matters Deemed Admitted is Granted, for good cause shown. Because Defendant represents that he did in fact serve responses to Plaintiff's Request for Admission, those requests will not be deemed admitted for all purposes in this litigation. Plaintiff did not file an opposition to this motion. This motion is being heard by Judge Miller because Judge Pro Tem Renne who signed the original order filed May 10, 2013 is not sitting as a Judge Pro Tem until September 5, 2013. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
